name: sd-lap-lane-finder
description: Lap lane availability by region (San Diego first)

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/data/pools dist/data && cp src/data/regions.json dist/data/ && find dist/data/pools -maxdepth 1 -name '*.json' -delete && find src/data/pools -maxdepth 1 -name '*.json' ! -name '*.draft.json' -exec cp {} dist/data/pools/ \;
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.ingest:refresh: npm run build && node dist/ingest/cli.js --region san-diego --refresh-pdfs
